---
name: Milestone / feature task
about: Track a milestone slice or feature with a clear outcome and DoD
title: ""
labels: []
---

## Milestone

<!-- e.g. M8: Thin FastAPI contract · leave blank for unscheduled work -->

## Outcome

<!-- One sentence: what "done" looks like for this issue. -->

## Scope

<!-- What is in / out. Prefer one issue → one branch → one PR. -->

## Sub-tasks

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ] Update docs (`README.md`, `DEPLOYMENT.md`, or `docs/operators/ROADMAP.md`) if needed

## Definition of done

- [ ] Outcome met; verified locally (or CI) as applicable
- [ ] Documentation updated when behavior or ops change
- [ ] No secrets committed (API keys, client hostnames, real VPS URLs stay out of git)

## Expected commits

<!-- Typical: 1 for docs, 1–2 for infra, 2–4 for features. One PR closes this issue. -->

## Notes

<!-- Links, blockers, related issues. Add labels (type-feature, type-infra, …) as needed. -->
